---
title: "The Rev. Robert Wickham"
---

## The Rev. Robert Wickham

**Dates:** (1802/3-21 Dec 1880)

### Description

master of Twyford School

### Biography

He was subsequently Vicar of Gresford, Denbigh, 1847. He was third son of William Wickham of Winchester [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]  He is found in the 1851 census at Gresford  with his wife Jane Susannah, 52; daughters Elizabeth Ann, 18; and Laura Maria, 6;  in the 1871 census with wife Jane Susannah, 72 b. Teignmouth, daughter Laura Maria, 26, and brother in law Thomas Vowler Short (1790-1872) late Bp of St Asaph, 80.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
